text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, world! And what a<n>pristine morning
it is!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The loving warmth of sunlight dappled<n>through the
leaves, pretty little birds<n>singing their darling
songs...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is as if the world is celebrating my<n>awakening!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This must all be the work of that<n>wonderful
Umamusume who<n>appeared in my dreams...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, me! For this beautiful<n>morning!

text_block_list.name: Phantom Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is no need for thanks, me. I<n>would gladly
visit you in dreamland,<n>time and time again!
